# Phase 1 Broker Signup — Automated + Manual QA Checklist

⚠️ **HYBRID MODEL:** 8 automated steps + 6 manual checks  
**Guide:** See `PHASE_1_AUTOMATED_SMOKE_TEST.md` for full details

**Test Date:** [DATE]  
**Admin Email:** [LOGGED-IN ADMIN]  
**Environment:** [LOCAL/STAGING/PROD]  
**Run ID:** PHASE1-[YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS] (generated by automated harness)

---

## PART A: AUTOMATED SMOKE TEST EXECUTION

### A.1 Launch QA Harness
- [ ] Navigate to `/command-center/qa/phase-1-broker-smoke-test` (admin only)
- [ ] Click "Run Smoke Test" button
- [ ] **Expected:** Automated test executes for 2–3 minutes
- [ ] **Record:** Run ID generated (copy for later cleanup)

### A.2 Review Automated Results
- [ ] All 8 steps visible in results table
- [ ] **Expected status:** PASS for all steps
  - [ ] Step 1: Broker 1 seeded → PASS
  - [ ] Step 2: Broker 1 validated pending → PASS
  - [ ] Step 3: Duplicate signup blocked → PASS
  - [ ] Step 4: Broker 2 seeded → PASS
  - [ ] Step 5: Broker 1 approved → PASS
  - [ ] Step 6: Broker 1 active → PASS
  - [ ] Step 7: Idempotency verified → PASS
  - [ ] Step 8: Broker 2 pending → PASS

### A.3 Record Test Data
- [ ] Broker 1 (Acme) Email: `john.smith+phase1-[runId]@broker.local`
- [ ] Broker 1 Profile ID: ________________
- [ ] Broker 1 Relationship ID: ________________
- [ ] Broker 2 (Premier) Email: `jane.doe+phase1-[runId]@broker.local`
- [ ] Broker 2 Profile ID: ________________

**If any step FAILs:**
- [ ] Stop and review error details
- [ ] Document issue
- [ ] Do NOT proceed to manual checks
- [ ] Fix backend function, re-run test

---

## PART B: MANUAL CHECKS (Browser/Auth/Visual)

### B.1 Hard Refresh `/broker-signup`
- [ ] Navigate to `/broker-signup`
- [ ] Press Ctrl+Shift+R (hard refresh)
- [ ] **Expected:** Form loads, no errors
- [ ] **Result:** [ ] PASS / [ ] FAIL

### B.2 Hard Refresh `/command-center/broker-agencies` (as admin)
- [ ] Make sure logged in as admin
- [ ] Navigate to `/command-center/broker-agencies`
- [ ] Press Ctrl+Shift+R (hard refresh)
- [ ] **Expected:** Broker list loads with automated test data
- [ ] **Result:** [ ] PASS / [ ] FAIL

### B.3 Deny Non-Admin Access
- [ ] Log out or open incognito
- [ ] Try to navigate to `/command-center/broker-agencies`
- [ ] **Expected:** 404 or Access Denied (no broker list visible)
- [ ] **Result:** [ ] PASS / [ ] FAIL

### B.4 Verify Test Brokers in List
- [ ] (Admin logged in)
- [ ] Look for Broker 1 (Acme) in list
- [ ] **Expected:** Status shows "active" (from automated approval)
- [ ] **Expected:** Broker 2 (Premier) status shows "pending_profile_completion"
- [ ] **Result:** [ ] PASS / [ ] FAIL

### B.5 Verify Database State (Broker 1 - Approved)
- [ ] Base44 → Entities → BrokerAgencyProfile
- [ ] Search for Broker 1 (automated email)
- [ ] **Verify:**
  - [ ] `onboarding_status`: `active`
  - [ ] `portal_access_enabled`: `true`
  - [ ] `approved_by_user_email`: [admin email]
  - [ ] `approved_at`: [timestamp]
- [ ] **Result:** [ ] PASS / [ ] FAIL

### B.6 Verify Database State (Broker 2 - Pending)
- [ ] Base44 → Entities → BrokerAgencyProfile
- [ ] Search for Broker 2 (automated email)
- [ ] **Verify:**
  - [ ] `onboarding_status`: `pending_profile_completion`
  - [ ] `portal_access_enabled`: `false`
  - [ ] `approved_by_user_email`: (null)
- [ ] **Result:** [ ] PASS / [ ] FAIL

---
